title: Persist lichend RPL identity state
description: Implement a Linux NonVolatile backend with atomic durable replacement and old-value preservation on failure, then define lichend root identity and link-epoch load/provision lifecycle. Derive the root IPv6 IID/DODAG identity consistently from the persisted key and reject mismatched configured state.
acceptance_criteria: Crash/failure tests prove durable DAO replay and TX state updates preserve the previous value on failed replacement; restart tests retain root identity and advance a safe link epoch; configured root address and persisted identity mismatches fail closed; three reviews pass.
close_reason: NonVolatile Linux FileStorage with atomic durable (fsync+rename) updates and failure preservation implemented; root identity/epoch load/provision from persisted seed+urandom, IID/DODAG derivation via Identity::from_seed, fail-closed on mismatch; crash/restart test added and passing; fmt/clippy/test/3 review passes; related persistence/RPL explored via parallel greps.
